_ngcontent-ng-c358756157="" _nghost-ng-c892184198="" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c892184198="" class="injected-content view-description text-break"><p>AXIS was founded by three civil engineers, licensed surveyors and graduates from the world renowned university, the Technion.</p>
<p>Since its establishment in 2009, AXIS quickly became the leader in the region.<br>Currently, AXIS holds a large part of the local market in Israel, the West Bank and Jordan.<br>It is a dynamic AXIS player in the geodetic surveyor's instrument market.</p>
<p>AXIS has effectively provided all types of instruments for a variety of projects diverging in magnitude and scope. These site surveys have included special services such as site lines, three-dimensional modeling, and development of exhibits. Furthermore, AXIS offers in-house GPS capabilities utilizing, GPS / GNSS Receiver Epoch 35 and Epoch 50 which is one of the most advanced GPS instruments on the market. We firmly believe that our unique combination of high technology equipment and highly trained, dedicated and experienced staff is what sets us apart from our competition.</p>
<p>AXIS is a Trimble certificated service provider .</p>
<p>· AXIS is the only company which has 4 licensed surveyors who provide training and support over the phone and in-house at all locations, in Arabic, Hebrew and English.</p>
<p>· AXIS invested in fabricating a high- tech laboratory center. Skilled technicians are On The Conducting in equipment repair and calibration for all measurement instruments.</p>
<p>· AXIS is a leader in providing highly advanced measuring instruments; the exclusive representative of the prestigious Spectra & Nikon companies in Israel and the West Bank. <br>On Management:</p>
<p>* Professional and qualified Acknowledgments in all instruments in the market.</p>
<p>* Acknowledgments in all software of the instruments in the market, .giving solutions to clients all time, all the days of the week</p></div></da-description-preview><!----><!----></div></div><div
